summary: This topic outlines the process of manually assigning a specific vehicle route and pick-up point to an individual student. The system automatically calculates and adds the corresponding transport fees to the student's fee demand based on the assigned route and pick-up point.
steps: Navigate to 'Student List' and select the desired student.
Click on the 'Detail' option for the student.
In the pop-up window, select the 'Vehicle Route' from the dropdown list.
Select the 'Pick-up Point' from the dropdown list (points associated with the selected route will appear).
The 'Amount' for the selected pick-up point will be automatically fetched.
Confirm or select the 'Drop Point' (can be the same as pick-up or different if toggled).
Select the 'Installment(s)' for which the transport fee should be applied.
Click 'Assign' to save the transport assignment.
business_rules: The system automatically fetches the transport amount based on the selected pick-up point and route.
Upon assignment, the transport amount is automatically added to the student's fee demand for the selected installments.
important_notes: This method is suitable for individual student assignments or modifications, whereas 'Transport Excel Upload' is for bulk assignments.
The system confirms successful route assignment to the student.
questions: How do I manually assign a transport route to a single student?
Will the transport fees be automatically added to the student's demand after manual assignment?
Can I select different drop points than pick-up points during manual assignment?
What happens after I assign a route to a student manually?
